steps.title: Model total earnings
steps.content:
Total earnings equal base salary plus commission. Since commission is $14\%$ of sales, the total earnings are
$$x+0.14s$$

steps.title: Use the earnings goal
steps.content:
The goal is at least $4$ times and at most $5$ times the base salary:
$$4x \le x+0.14s \le 5x$$
Subtract $x$ from all three parts:
$$3x \le 0.14s \le 4x$$

steps.title: Isolate sales
steps.content:
Divide each part by $0.14$:
$$\frac{3}{0.14}x \le s \le \frac{4}{0.14}x$$
The answer is B.
